hero.subtitle: Specialized in React, Next.js, and WebSocket systems. Focused on performance, clean architecture, and delivering reliable user experiences.

about.label: About Me
about.title: The person
description: I'm a Frontend Developer based in Hanoi, Vietnam, with 3+ years of production experience building real-world web and mobile applications across diverse domains — from aviation systems to omnichannel commerce.

I specialize in ReactJS, Next.js, and TypeScript, with a strong focus on clean architecture and component reusability. Over the past year, I've expanded into full-stack development with NestJS, building backend APIs and integrating AI-powered features into production products.

future.title: Fullstack Engineering
future.description: I'm deepening my expertise toward Fullstack Engineering — expanding beyond the frontend to architect end-to-end systems, own the full delivery cycle, and bridge the gap between UI and infrastructure. I believe the best frontend engineers are those who understand the full picture.

highlights: Frontend Engineer with 3+ years of production experience
Specialized in React, Next.js, and real-time systems
Strong focus on performance, clean architecture, and testing
Passionate about mentoring and pair programming

experience.title: Experience

contact.title: Let’s work together
contact.description: I’m open to Frontend or Fullstack opportunities. Feel free to reach out if you’d like to collaborate or discuss a role.
